title: Set Of 10 Christmas Crackers Festive Table Decor Scandinavian Print White And Red Xmas Tree Reindeer (Silver & White Snowflakedesign 0301)
features: Elevate your festive celebrations with our 10 Pack Christmas Crackers, featuring a delightful Santa & Friends design that captures the spirit of the holiday season.
Each cracker measures a generous 30cm, making them a perfect addition to your Christmas table setting.
This set includes ten beautifully crafted crackers, each containing a festive hat, a whimsical motto, and a traditional cracker gift, ensuring that every guest enjoys a moment of surprise and joy.
Ideal for family gatherings, holiday parties, or as a charming gift, these Christmas crackers are designed to bring laughter and cheer, creating lasting memories during your holiday festivities.
Each cracker measures: 30.48cm/12inch. Packaging and cracker shell are 100% recyclable & plastic-free.
